records.technical_description: Limestone calcined clay cement (LC3) replaces a portion of clinker with calcined clay and limestone, reducing process CO2 emissions.

records.technical_description: Injects captured CO2 into fresh concrete where it mineralizes, improving strength and permanently storing CO2.
records.replaces_or_improves: Conventional ready-mix concrete production without CO2 utilization.
